description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators.

policies.refund: No refunds are offered after 7 days from the date of purchase.
policies.support: 24/7 support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users receive email support during business hours.
policies.free_trial: A 7-day free trial is available for the Pro plan.
policies.cancellation: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the billing period.

faq.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports direct publishing to YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and Twitter/X.

faq.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect on the next billing cycle.

faq.question: Is there a free plan?
faq.answer: There is no permanent free plan, but we offer a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan.
